text:
Rebuild of EVANGELION: 3.0+1.11 is a video included in the home video release (second disc) of Evangelion: 3.0+1.11 Thrice Upon A Time. It was released on 08 March 2023. The video shows the evolution of the process of making the film with a few step-by-step looks and comparisons between the animatics and the final product. 3.0+1.11 Promotion Reel released on 12 January 2023 via EVA-EXTRA App notification 

Staff

Editor: Emi Tsujita
Supervision: Ikki Todoroki
Sound Director: Yō Yamada
Music: Shirō Sagisu

Trivia

Officially, this is the only use of the term Rebuild of Evangelion since the announcement of the film series project back in 2006, when Evangelion: New Theatrical Edition had the name REBUILD OF EVANGELION（Working Title). The term Rebuild of EVANGELION would still be used in the making-of bonus features of 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 3.0 + 1.11, and 3.0 (-46h).
At 13:33 into the video, a CG shot is featured that was ultimately cut from the final film - the Spear of Gaius piercing through parts of the film's script, causing the letters in it to scatter as it is being delivered to Shinji.
